pr.title: feat: membership requests admin panel
pr.body:
Club admins need visibility into membership requests to approve or deny them, similar to the existing resource access request flow.

## Changes

### Backend
- New migration `20260524000003_membership_request_rpc.sql` adding `list_club_membership_requests` RPC — admin-only, joins `memberships` + `users` to enrich with display name/callsign, excludes the calling admin

### Frontend — `club.service.ts`
- `MembershipRequest` interface
- `listClubMembershipRequests(clubId)` — calls new RPC
- `setMembershipStatus(membershipId, status)` — delegates to existing `approve_deny_membership` RPC

### Frontend — `ClubDetailPage`
- Signals: `membershipRequests`, `membershipRequestsError`, `actioningMembershipId`, `membershipActionError`
- `approveMembership` / `denyMembership` methods, backed by `setMembershipRequestStatus`
- `loadMembershipRequests()` called in parallel with `loadAccessRequests()` during `ngOnInit` for admins

### Frontend — `club-detail.html`
- New "Membership Requests" admin card: displays each requester's name, current status badge (`Pending`/`Approved`/`Denied`), and both Approve + Deny buttons always enabled — identical pattern to the Resource Access Requests card
pr.author: Copilot
